name: Billtrust AR Automation API
what_it_does: Billtrust REST API for accounts receivable automation and order-to-cash platform. Enables AI agents to automate invoice delivery, process payments, apply cash to open invoices, manage customer payment portals, and integrate AR data with ERP systems. Billtrust covers the full order-to-cash cycle including credit decisioning, e-invoicing, payment collection, and cash application.
use_cases: Automating invoice delivery and payment collection from AR automation agents
Processing customer payments and applying cash from order-to-cash agents
Managing credit limits and customer payment terms from credit management agents
Integrating AR data with ERP systems from finance operations agents
not_for: Accounts payable (AP) automation — Billtrust is AR-only
Consumer payment processing without B2B invoicing requirements
Simple invoicing without automated cash application needs
best_when: A B2B company wanting to accelerate cash collection wants AI agents to automate invoice delivery, follow up on overdue invoices, process payments, and apply cash automatically.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: AR automation errors can result in incorrect payment application, credit limit violations, and customer disputes. B2B payments involve real financial obligations.

auth.notes: Billtrust uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Scopes available for different AR workflow components. Enterprise customer API access with dedicated credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise B2B AR automation pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per transaction volume and modules
pricing.notes: B2B AR automation platform. EQT-backed (acquired 2023 by FLEETCOR/Corpay). Enterprise pricing negotiated by AR volume.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits per customer account

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment application errors and incorrect cash application can cause financial discrepancies
No public MCP server — enterprise-only REST API
Limited public documentation — requires enterprise customer access
US-only data residency — may not meet international compliance requirements
Acquired by Corpay/FLEETCOR in 2023 — product roadmap and pricing in transition
PCI-DSS scope: payment processing requires cardholder data handling compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: B2B payment processing and AR data. PCI-DSS (payment), SOC2. US-only data residency. Enterprise-only with limited public docs.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B payment and AR data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. US-only. Enterprise-only with limited public documentation.
